summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Iteration 5 features: Multi-language support (ES/EN/FR) and Onboarding modal. All core features verified working correctly with minor issues noted.

issues: Lines 280, 283, 287 in HomePage.jsx have hardcoded Spanish text ('232 municipios', 'Explora Veracruz', 'Ver todos') instead of using t() translations

passed_tests: Language selector (globe icon) visible in Header navigation bar
Clicking language selector shows dropdown with ES, EN, FR options
Language selector shows current language code (ES, EN, FR)
Switching to English translates: hero title ('Veracruz awaits you'), nav links, buttons, section headings
Switching to French translates: hero title ('Veracruz vous attend'), nav links, buttons, section headings
Switching back to Spanish restores all original text ('Veracruz te espera')
Language preference persists after page reload (stored in localStorage key 'vc_lang')
Weather section translates correctly (Cloudy with fog / Nublado con niebla / Nuageux avec brouillard)
Footer translates correctly in all 3 languages (Explore, Information, Contact sections)
Footer slogan translates ('For the Love of Veracruz' / 'Por Amor a Veracruz' / 'Par Amour pour Veracruz')
Footer copyright translates correctly
/rutas page title translates ('Travel Routes' / 'Rutas de Viaje' / 'Itinéraires de Voyage')
Features section translates ('Why Veracruz Contigo?' / 'Pourquoi Veracruz Contigo?')
Login as encargado (encargado.orizaba@veracruzcontigo.gob.mx / Orizaba2024!) shows onboarding modal
Onboarding modal shows '¡Tu municipio te necesita!' title for encargado role
Onboarding modal has 4 steps with step indicators
Onboarding modal has 'Siguiente' (Next) and 'Omitir' (Skip) buttons
Clicking 'Siguiente' advances through steps
Last step shows '¡Entendido!' button
Clicking Skip button closes modal and marks onboarding as seen
Closing onboarding marks it as seen in localStorage (key: vc_onboarding_{user_id})
Homepage renders correctly in all 3 languages without errors
action_items: MINOR: Update HomePage.jsx lines 280, 283, 287 to use t() translations instead of hardcoded Spanish text for '232 municipios', 'Explora Veracruz', 'Ver todos'
critical_code_review_comments: HomePage.jsx has 3 hardcoded Spanish strings in the municipios section that should use translations

success_rate.backend: N/A (no backend changes in this iteration)
success_rate.frontend: 95% (22/23 features verified working, 1 minor translation issue)

seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - translations are frontend-only
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 i18n and onboarding features fully tested. Language switching (ES/EN/FR) works correctly with localStorage persistence. Onboarding modal triggers on first login for encargado role with 4-step wizard. Minor issue: HomePage.jsx has 3 hardcoded Spanish strings in municipios section. All data-testid attributes are properly implemented: language-selector, lang-es, lang-en, lang-fr, onboarding-modal, onboarding-close, onboarding-skip, onboarding-next.
